About Paul

Good Work,
Done Right

When you call Paul, you get Paul — not a dispatcher, not a crew you've never met. He shows up on time, he gets the job done, and he leaves your place cleaner than he found it.

Paul has built a reputation around the Miami Valley on one simple principle: treat every customer's home like it's your own. Whether the task is big or small, he brings the same care, attention to detail, and personal pride that has kept his customers calling him back year after year.

Based right here in Troy, Ohio, Paul is your neighbor first and your handyman second. When you hire Paul, you're supporting someone who genuinely cares about this community.
